stashBoxCacheUi.title: StashBox data cache
stashBoxCacheUi.info: Performer and scene metadata is cached on demand in local SQLite. Browsing can fall back to stale data when refreshes fail.
stashBoxCacheUi.ttlInfo: Allowed range: 12–360 hours; default: 24. Subscription checks always refresh the newest batch.
stashBoxCacheUi.clearDescription: Delete all performer and scene metadata snapshots. Future access will fetch them again on demand.

performerCacheUi.stale: StashBox refresh failed. Showing the last cached data.

settings.title: Configuration & system
settings.waiting: Waiting for settings data from the server

ingest.pathMapInfo: Moji translates the task's qB path into a Stash scan path without moving files.
ingest.transferInfo: Moji translates the qB path into a locally accessible source, delivers it to the library, and maps the same relative path to Stash.
ingest.qbRootInfo: The download root from qBittorrent's perspective. ContentPath and SavePath are made relative to this root.
ingest.mojiDownloadInfo: The download root from Moji's perspective. TRANSFER appends the relative path here to locate the readable source.
ingest.mojiLibraryInfo: The media root from Moji's perspective. TRANSFER appends the relative path here to create the delivery destination.
ingest.stashInfo: The media root from Stash's perspective. Both modes append the relative path here and request a Stash scan.
ingest.actionInfo: COPY preserves the source, MOVE relocates it, and SYMLINK creates a library link. Delivery fails when the destination already exists.
ingest.noQbDefault: No qB default download directory is configured
ingest.initializeWith: Initialize the qB download root with {{path}}
ingest.emptyTitle: The qB download root is empty
ingest.initQuestion: Initialize it with qB's default directory, {{path}}?

policy.summary: Solo: {{solo}}; 2–{{max}} performers: {{group}}; compilation: {{compilation}}; release range: {{range}}; ambiguous classifications or dates are recorded for review.

automationUi.soloInfo: Applies when the scene has one performer.
automationUi.groupInfo: Applies to scenes with 2 through N performers, and larger scenes that do not match the compilation rule.
automationUi.compilationInfo: Compilation classification takes precedence and uses title, details, tags, and unusually large casts.
automationUi.groupMaxInfo: Group means 2 through N performers; larger scenes remain group scenes unless identified as compilations.
automationUi.dateRangeInfo: Only applies when the policy would download. Older or undated releases are recorded for review.
automationUi.saved: Automation settings saved. New subscription discoveries will use this policy; recorded releases are not reevaluated.

stashBoxes.title: Stash-Box source priority
stashBoxes.detail: Stash-Box endpoints configured in Stash appear here. All endpoints participate in subscription queries; drag cards to change priority.
stashBoxes.loadingDetail: The server performs this automatically during startup. Please wait.
stashBoxes.empty: No Stash-Box endpoints are configured in Stash
stashBoxes.emptyDetail: Add at least one endpoint in Stash, then refresh this list.

ruleUi.title: Automatic torrent selection rules
ruleUi.detail: These only affect automatic candidate selection. Rules are compared from top to bottom.
ruleUi.configured: {{count}} rule configured; enable the chain to apply it.
ruleUi.configured_other: {{count}} rules configured; enable the chain to apply them.
ruleUi.similarityHint: Sort by normalized similarity between the query and title; there are no additional parameters.
ruleUi.titleHint: Match titles in order. PLAIN is literal, REGEX is regular expression, and PREFER/AVOID controls ranking.
ruleUi.inspectionIntro: Torrent structure refinement runs after fast rules and inspects the first {{count}} candidates that provide a .torrent link.
ruleUi.inspectionInfo: Only affects the two structure rules below. Larger values download and parse more torrent files in the second phase.
ruleUi.singleVideoHint: Inspect the first {{count}} candidates with a .torrent link and prefer a single-video structure. Magnet links are not inspected.
ruleUi.fileHint: Match paths or filenames inside the torrent in order.
ruleUi.fileModeHint: PLAIN is literal, REGEX is regular expression, and LOCK immediately selects a match.

logsUi.emptyDetail: There are no recent entries for the current filter.
logsUi.downloadFailed: Failed to download the current log file.

systemUi.title: System
systemUi.deleteInfo: Controls whether deleting a Moji task also removes its qBittorrent item and downloaded files.
systemUi.keep: Delete only the Moji task record
systemUi.removeFiles: Also remove the qBittorrent task and files
systemUi.cacheInfo: Images are always proxied by Moji. When disabled, existing cache entries remain readable but new images are not persisted.
systemUi.maxSizeInfo: Allowed range: 64–20480 MB. LRU cleanup reduces usage to 90% of the limit.
systemUi.retentionInfo: Allowed range: 1–365 days. Images not accessed within this period are removed.
systemUi.disabled: Disk persistence is disabled, so these settings are currently inactive.
systemUi.clearHint: Source registrations remain after clearing; images download again on their next access.
systemUi.clearDescription: Delete {{count}} local images and release {{size}}. Source registrations will remain.

errors.notFoundDetail: There is no Moji page at this address.
errors.unknown: The request failed. Try again later.
errors.withId: The request failed. Try again later. Correlation ID: {{id}}

backend.DUPLICATE_TORRENT_TASK: Another Moji task already uses this torrent or magnet.
backend.DUPLICATE_CODE_TASK: Another Moji task already uses this code, so strict deduplication rejected the request.
backend.DUPLICATE_LIBRARY_CODE: A scene with this code already exists in the Stash library.
backend.TASK_CODE_REQUIRED: A stable scene code must be extracted before creating a task.
backend.TASK_BATCH_TOO_LARGE: A batch can contain at most 100 tasks.
backend.PERFORMER_BATCH_TOO_LARGE: A batch can contain at most 100 performers.
backend.PERFORMER_SCENE_BATCH_EMPTY: Select at least one performer scene.
backend.PERFORMER_SCENE_BATCH_TOO_LARGE: A batch can contain at most 100 performer scenes.
backend.TRACKER_NOT_CONFIGURED: No indexer is configured. Check the Jackett connection.
backend.DOWNLOADER_NOT_CONFIGURED: No downloader is configured. Check the qBittorrent connection.
backend.SCAN_PATH_REQUIRED: No path is available for the Stash scan.
backend.INTERNAL_ERROR: The server encountered an error while processing the request.

stats.title: Runtime overview
stats.placeholderDetail: Speed, queue, success-rate, and time-series charts can be added here later.

toast.copyFailed: Copy failed. Check the browser's clipboard permission.

localeUi.loadFailed: The language resource failed to load. The current language was kept.

errorSpecial.STASH_NOT_CONFIGURED: Stash is not configured. Check the connection settings.

errorExtra.TRANSFER_PATH_FAILED: Ingest path mapping failed. Check the qB, Moji, and Stash root paths.
errorExtra.STASH_SCAN_FAILED: The Stash scan failed. Check the connection and scan path.
errorExtra.NO_TORRENT_CANDIDATE: No downloadable torrent candidate was found.
errorExtra.TORRENT_URL_REQUIRED: A valid torrent or magnet URL is required.
errorExtra.ADD_TORRENT_FAILED: The download task could not be submitted.

home.todosNote: Failed, pending-scan, and stalled tasks appear here.
home.noTodosDetail: Failed, pending-scan, and abnormal tasks are prioritized here.
home.retryNoResult: The retry failed because the server returned no task record.

diagnostics.stashError: Configured but recently unreachable. Check the Stash service.
diagnostics.stashMissing: Configure Stash before using ingest and performer updates.
diagnostics.stashPending: Stash is configured and waiting for its first check, or its status is stale.
diagnostics.jackettError: Configured but recently unreachable. Check the Jackett service.
diagnostics.jackettMissing: Configure Jackett to provide upstream data for task searches and performer updates.
diagnostics.jackettPending: Jackett is configured and waiting for its first check, or its status is stale.
diagnostics.qbError: Configured but recently unreachable. Check the qBittorrent service.
diagnostics.qbMissing: Configure qBittorrent before downloads and delivery can run.
diagnostics.qbPending: qBittorrent is configured and waiting for its first check, or its status is stale.

blockers.jackettSearch: No indexer source for task searches
blockers.jackettPerformers: No upstream data for performer updates
blockers.qbLanding: No client can finish downloaded content

ingest.title: Ingest
ingest.incomplete: A workflow is selected, but its path mapping is incomplete.
ingest.guidePathMap: Moji translates the qB download path into a Stash scan path without moving files.
ingest.cautionPathMap: Configure both the qB download root and Stash library root; each uses its own namespace.
ingest.guideTransfer: Moji translates the qB path into a local source, delivers it to the library, and then calculates the Stash scan path.
ingest.cautionTransfer: Configure qB, Moji, and Stash roots. Delivery fails if the destination already contains the same file or directory.
ingest.guideNone: Select an ingest policy to continue.
ingest.blockerQb: qB download root is not mapped
ingest.blockerStash: Stash library root is not mapped
ingest.blockerScan: Completed tasks cannot resolve a scan path

tasks.title: Workspace
tasks.searchPlaceholder: Search tasks, codes, trackers, or statuses

empty.title: No matching tasks
empty.detail: Try different filters or create a task from Discover.

attention.label: Needs attention
attention.description: Failed tasks, scan errors, and tasks requiring review.

active.label: Running
active.description: Tasks downloading, syncing, or waiting for an external state change.

ingestPending.label: Pending ingest
ingestPending.description: Downloads completed but the Stash scan has not finished.

taskRoute.retryNoResult: The retry failed because the server returned no task record.
taskRoute.noneBlocked: There are no blocked tasks to retry.
taskRoute.retrySummary: Blocked-task retry complete: {{succeeded}} succeeded and {{failed}} failed.
taskRoute.deleteNoResult: Deletion failed because the server returned no deleted task record.

taskBatch.limit: You can select up to {{count}} tasks at once.
taskBatch.groupLimit: There are more than {{count}} ingest tasks. Filter and select them in batches.

deletePolicies.KEEP_ONLY: Only the Moji task records will be deleted.
deletePolicies.REMOVE_TORRENT: The qBittorrent downloads will also be removed. This cannot be undone.
deletePolicies.REMOVE_TORRENT_AND_FILES: The qBittorrent downloads and downloaded files will also be removed. This cannot be undone.

reasons.NOT_READY_FOR_INGEST: Task is not ready for ingest

taskUi.noneSelectedDetail: Select a task card to see its details and actions here.
taskUi.cannotResolve: This task cannot be resolved manually
taskUi.cannotResolveDetail: The task may have left the blocked sourcing stage. Close this panel and refresh the list.

resolution.noResult: The server returned no resumed task record.
resolution.title: Resolve blocked sourcing manually
resolution.detail: Search again for {{code}}, or provide a magnet link to continue the existing task.
resolution.none: No candidates found. Update Jackett and search again, or paste a magnet link.

failure.blockedDetail: The task is blocked without additional error context.
failure.scanPendingDetail: The download is complete and waiting for Stash to finish scanning.
failure.downloadingDetail: The task is waiting for its download state to change.
failure.healthyDetail: The task has no explicit error and is waiting for the next sync.
failure.missingScanPathDetail: The task has no content or save path available for a Stash scan.
failure.stashMissingDetail: This task requires a Stash scan, but the connection is disabled.
failure.noCandidateDetail: Search returned results, but none had a usable magnet or torrent link.
failure.trackerMissingDetail: The download workflow cannot reach Jackett or another search provider.
failure.torrentMissingDetail: The manually created task has no valid magnet or download URL.
failure.duplicateTorrentDetail: Another Moji task already uses the same torrent or magnet.
failure.duplicateCodeDetail: A Moji task already uses this code, so strict deduplication rejected the request.
failure.codeMissingDetail: A code is required before task creation, but the input could not be parsed reliably.
failure.downloaderMissingDetail: Configure qBittorrent before submitting this task.

lifecycle.sourcingCurrent: Moji created the task and is searching and ranking resources.
lifecycle.sourcingUpcoming: Waiting for the task before searching for resources.
lifecycle.downloadUpcoming: This stage starts after selecting a torrent and submitting it to qBittorrent.
lifecycle.ingestUpcoming: The task enters pending ingest after qB finishes downloading.
lifecycle.ingestCurrent: Download completed; waiting to begin ingest.
lifecycle.ingestDone: Download completed and entered the ingest workflow.
lifecycle.noTransferCurrent: This ingest mode does not move files; Moji will proceed directly to scanning.
lifecycle.noTransfer: This ingest mode does not move files.
lifecycle.transferUpcoming: When needed, Moji copies, moves, or links files at this stage.
lifecycle.preparingTarget: Moji is preparing the delivery target.
lifecycle.scanUpcoming: Moji triggers a Stash scan after ingest preparation.
lifecycle.scanWaiting: Waiting for Stash to take over the scan.
lifecycle.completeUpcoming: The task becomes complete after the scan finishes.

presentation.transfer: Download complete; Moji is preparing file delivery.
presentation.scan: Download complete; waiting for Stash to finish.
presentation.pending: Download complete; waiting to trigger or finish the Stash scan.
presentation.noScan: No scan result is available yet.
presentation.downloaderWaiting: Waiting for the downloader to advance the task.
presentation.stageWaiting: Waiting for the current stage to advance.

discoverUi.recommendationNote: Recommendations, notifications, and bulk actions can be added here later.
discoverUi.recommendationDetail: Complete the health, task, and scan workflows before enabling recommendations.

placeholders.first: Enter a code, title, performer, or keyword
placeholders.fourth: Subscribed performers will appear in recommendations

filters.title: Indexer filters
filters.disconnectedDetail: No Jackett indexers are available. Check the Jackett URL and API key in Settings.
filters.disabled: This indexer is not configured in Jackett

result.enterDetail: Search by code, title, performer, or any keyword. Press / to focus the field.
result.tryJackettDetail: Try the broader Jackett fallback search.
result.noFilteredDetail: Remove some indexer restrictions and try again.

performerRoute.subscribed: Subscribed to {{name}}; Moji records the state in custom_fields.
performerRoute.checkedAll: Started an update check for all subscribed performers.
performerRoute.reloaded: Reloaded the performer list from Stash.
performerRoute.noSelection: No selected scenes can be submitted. Refresh the list and try again.
performerRoute.batchNoResult: Bulk download failed because the server returned no result.
performerRoute.createNoResult: Task creation failed because the server returned no result.

reasons.ALREADY_IN_LIBRARY: This scene is already in the Stash library.
reasons.DUPLICATE_CODE_TASK: A download task already exists for this code.
reasons.DUPLICATE_TORRENT_TASK: A download task already uses this torrent or magnet.
reasons.MISSING_CODE: No stable scene code could be resolved.
reasons.NO_STASHBOX_SOURCE: No downloadable StashBox source is available for this scene.
reasons.SCENE_NOT_FOUND: This scene is no longer available for the performer. Refresh and try again.
reasons.QUEUE_FAILED: The download task could not be created. Try again later.
reasons.UNKNOWN: The scene could not be added to the download queue.

performerBatch.hidden: {{count}} selected performers are outside this page
performerBatch.limit: You can select up to {{count}} performers at once.
performerBatch.noResult: The batch operation returned no result.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe {{count}} performers?
unsubscribe.detail: This removes the Moji subscription marker in Stash and clears local subscription state. Existing tasks and files are not deleted.

refresh.title: Check {{count}} subscribed performers?
refresh.detail: This queries StashBox for new releases and may create download tasks under the current automation policy.

reasons.PERFORMER_NOT_FOUND: Performer no longer exists in Stash
reasons.STASH_UPDATE_FAILED: Failed to update the Stash subscription marker

performerUi.sceneSearch: Search scene titles, codes, or studios
performerUi.createScene: Create a download task for this scene
performerUi.noScenesDetail: Adjust the search or filters and try again.
performerUi.detailMissingHelp: Return to the list and select the performer again.
performerUi.search: Search Stash performers by name or alias
performerUi.reloadHint: Reload performer details and subscription markers without checking releases
performerUi.noPerformersDetail: Try a different query or confirm that Stash returns performer data.
performerUi.waitingFirst: Subscribed; waiting for the first check.
